label: Wet Avalanche — Rain-on-Snow      (Feb 22, rapid warming + rain)
description: Based on the real February 22–23, 2025 atmospheric river event. An atmospheric river delivers 50 mm of rain to valley floors and transitions to heavy wet snow above 1800 m. Temperatures at Morrissey High rise from -2°C to +4°C in 6 hours. Rain-on-snow triggers a wet avalanche cycle. The system escalates to EXTREME.
